_comment: Template for o3 to fill. Each brief becomes a Forge generation target.
name: Bone Telephone
concept: sub→mouth: bass floor opening directly into speech. Gap body — this motion never appears in P2K corpus.

slots.note: Sub anchor that crosses up into throat territory on morph
Chest cavity that tightens into upper mouth on Q
Primary formant carrier — yields to let the mouth open
Presence peak that collapses into the mouth zone
Breath shelf — stays as ceiling reference
Wild card — sub-range scar that crosses into mid for fracture

motion_law: Bass floor splits open into a speaking mouth. Q tightens the cavity. Morph is jaw opening.
